2026-04-21JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a member of the Independent Judicial Advisory Committee for the Province of Quebec - EastAppointment of Sylvain Roy of Escuminac, Quebec, to be a member of the Independent Judicial Advisory Committee for the Province of Quebec - East, to hold office during pleasure for a term ending on April 30, 2027.N/A
subject: Appointment of a member of the Independent Judicial Advisory Committee for the Province of Quebec - East
precis: Appointment of Sylvain Roy of Escuminac, Quebec, to be a member of the Independent Judicial Advisory Committee for the Province of Quebec - East, to hold office during pleasure for a term ending on April 30, 2027.
